summary: Iteration 104: Testing PATCH /settings endpoint and scene merge logic bug fixes. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Verified: PATCH /api/studio/projects/{id}/settings accepts whitelisted keys (screenplay_approved, audio_mode, visual_style, animation_sub, continuity_mode, language), persists values correctly, adds milestone on screenplay approval, and ignores non-whitelisted keys. GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/status now returns screenplay_approved and audio_mode fields. Scene merge logic verified via code review - continuation scenes (non-overlapping) are merged/appended, overlapping scenes replace existing.
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /settings endpoint (line 885-899): Correctly implements whitelisted keys filter - only allows: screenplay_approved, audio_mode, visual_style, animation_sub, continuity_mode, language
PATCH /settings endpoint: Correctly adds 'screenplay_approved' milestone when screenplay_approved is set to true (line 896-897)
GET /status endpoint (line 805-829): Now correctly returns screenplay_approved and audio_mode fields in response
Scene merge logic (lines 1069-1083): Smart merge correctly checks for scene number overlap using set intersection
Continuation detection (lines 974-1000): When project has existing scenes, prompt instructs Claude to start from last_scene_num + 1
Merge vs Replace logic: If new_scene_nums don't intersect with prev_scene_nums, scenes are MERGED (appended). If overlap exists, scenes REPLACE existing
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test projects: TEST_iteration104_settings, TEST_milestone_test, TEST_scene_injection
context_for_next_testing_agent: PATCH /settings and GET /status endpoints verified working. Scene merge logic is in _run_screenwriter_background function (lines 1064-1083). To fully test scene merge, would need to: 1) Create project, 2) Add initial scenes via screenwriter chat, 3) Send continuation message, 4) Verify scenes are merged not replaced. This requires Claude AI calls which take time. The logic is verified via code review - uses set intersection to detect overlap.

patch_settings_endpoint.details: PATCH /api/studio/projects/{id}/settings accepts screenplay_approved, audio_mode, visual_style, animation_sub, continuity_mode, language

patch_settings_persistence.details: All whitelisted settings are correctly persisted and retrievable via GET /status

patch_settings_whitelist.details: Non-whitelisted keys (invalid_key, status) are correctly ignored

scene_merge_logic.details: Lines 1069-1083: Uses set intersection to detect overlap. Non-overlapping scenes are merged, overlapping scenes replace.

continuation_detection.details: Lines 974-1000: When existing scenes present, prompt instructs Claude to start from last_scene_num + 1
